---
title: "Arthropods"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr); library(knitr); library(kableExtra); library(DT)

sp_list <- read.csv(here::here("../LaSelva-MetaNetwork-data/data/L1/L1_harmonized_names/arthropod_sp_list.csv"))

df <- sp_list %>%
  arrange(order, family, species) %>%
  distinct(order, family, species)

datatable(
  df,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "RowGroup",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    rowGroup = list(dataSrc = 0),  # group by first column (order)
    columnDefs = list(
      list(visible = FALSE, targets = 0) # hide order column
    )
  )
)

```
